programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: As a war between humankind and monstrous sea creatures wages on, a former pilot and a trainee are paired up to drive a seemingly obsolete special weapon in an effort to save the world. Starring Charlie Hunnam, Diego Klattenhoff, Idris Elba.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: In 1991 in South Jamaica, Queens, 15-year-old Kanan Stark is eager to join his family's growing drug business that is led by his mother, Raquel Raq Thomas.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: After a rival crew member is killed, Raq does whatever is necessary to get the target off Kanan's back.

programme.title: Fugitive Pieces
programme.desc: A writer (Stephen Dillane) has trouble moving past his haunting memories of the Holocaust. Starring Stephen Dillane, Rade Serbedzija, Rosamund Pike.

programme.title: Laurence Anyways
programme.desc: In the '90s, Laurence tells his girlfriend, Fred, that he wants to become a woman; they confront the prejudices of their friends, ignore the council of their families and brave the phobias of the society they offend. Starring Melvil Poupaud, Suzanne Clément, Nathalie Baye.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus, Will and Kate travel to Mumbai to investigate a murder and the connection to the ancient cult of Kali, whose followers can foretell disaster.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will begins to experience strange visions that are connected to the Cult of Kali; Magnus has difficulty with finding the solution to their problems.

programme.title: Anthropocene: The Human Epoch
programme.desc: Filmmakers Jennifer Baichwal, Nicholas de Pencier and Edward Burtynsky travel the globe to document the impact humans have made on the planet.

programme.title: Babe
programme.desc: An Australian farmer (James Cromwell) adopts a piglet that becomes a champion sheep herder. Live action/animatronics. Starring James Cromwell, Magda Szubanski, Hugo Weaving.

programme.title: The Goonies
programme.desc: Young misfits find a 17th-century pirate's treasure map and set out to discover the treasure in order to save their neighborhood from redevelopment. Starring Sean Astin, Josh Brolin, Jeff Cohen.

programme.title: Tia and Piujuq
programme.desc: A 10-year-old Syrian refugee living in Montreal finds a magic portal leading to the Arctic. Starring Tia Bshara, Madeline Ivalu, Nuvvija Tulugarjuk.

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: In a race to find intelligent life in the universe, an astronomer and his freethinking research assistant make an inexplicable discovery that changes how they see the world -- and each other. Starring Patrick J. Adams, Troian Bellisario, Kristen Hager.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A young man inadvertently breaks three important rules concerning his new pet and unleashes a horde of malevolently mischievous monsters on a small town. Starring Zach Galligan, Phoebe Cates, Hoyt Axton.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two deskbound detectives get more than they bargain for when they take on a seemingly minor case that may turn out to be New York's biggest crime. Starring Will Ferrell, Mark Wahlberg, Eva Mendes.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: The ruler of the future tells best friends Bill and Ted they must compose a new song to save life as we know it. But instead of writing it, they decide to travel through time to steal it from their older selves and bring harmony to the universe. Starring Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter, Kristen Schaal.

programme.title: The Matrix Reloaded
programme.desc: Freedom fighters Neo, Trinity and Morpheus continue to lead the revolt against the Machine Army, unleashing their arsenal of extraordinary skills and weaponry against the systematic forces of repression and exploitation. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Still reeling from a shocking death, Kanan pushes his way into the drug game with Marvin's help while Raq plots to take down her competition.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: All bets are off when a police raid clears out Raq's competition; promises are broken, secrets are revealed, and revenge is swift.

programme.title: Inch'Allah
programme.desc: Chloe, a young Canadian doctor, lives in Israel and cares for pregnant Palestinian women in a refugee camp. Starring Evelyne Brochu, Sabrina Ouazani, Sivan Levy.

programme.title: Fubar 2
programme.desc: Head bangers Terry (David Lawrence) and Dean (Paul J. Spence) are tired of barely scraping by and jump on an opportunity to go north and work on the pipelines during the holidays. Starring Dave Lawrence, Paul Spence, Gordon Skilling.

programme.title: Double Happiness
programme.desc: Pleasing her Chinese-Canadian father (Stephen Chang) means an aspiring actress (Sandra Oh) must sacrifice her own pursuits. Starring Sandra Oh, Stephen A. Chang, Alannah Ong.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team must find Kali in order to prevent tidal waves from killing millions; Will fights for his life in Mumbai.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will is having trouble recovering after his experience with Kali, but the team soon finds that insomnia is the least of his problems; Helen discovers an unbelievable gift from an equally unbelievable source.

programme.title: Kayak to Klemtu
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl readies for a kayak trip along the shores of the Great Bear rainforest with her family to protest oil tanker traffic. Starring Evan Adams, Jared Ager-Foster, Carmel Amit.

programme.title: Eve & the Fire Horse
programme.desc: A 9-year-old Chinese girl (Phoebe Jojo Kut) and her older sister (Hollie Lo) embrace their experiences at a Roman Catholic Sunday school. Starring Phoebe Jojo Kut, Hollie Lo, Vivian Wu.

programme.title: One Day in the Life of Noah Piugattuk
programme.desc: A government agent tries to get an Inuit man and his children to move to settlement housing. Starring Kim Bodnia, Apayata Kotierk, Benjamin Kunuk.

programme.title: The Witches
programme.desc: A Norwegian (Mai Zetterling) and her grandson (Jasen Fisher) outwit British witches after one (Anjelica Huston) turns him into a mouse. Starring Anjelica Huston, Mai Zetterling, Jasen Fisher.

programme.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
programme.desc: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts (Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester) on a trip to find the origins of humans. Starring Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States. Starring Dennis Quaid, Penelope Ann Miller, Jon Voight.

programme.title: The Proposal
programme.desc: When a book editor faces deportation back to Canada, she declares that she's actually engaged to her put-upon assistant, who she's tormented for years. Starring Sandra Bullock, Ryan Reynolds, Mary Steenburgen.

programme.title: The Matrix Revolutions
programme.desc: The human city of Zion defends itself against the massive invasion of the machines as Neo fights to end the war at another front while also opposing the rogue Agent Smith. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Eager to transform her business after the stash house is hit, Raq overhauls her operation; Kanan is detained after a fight with Scrappy.

programme.title: Power Book III: Raising Kanan
programme.desc: Lou's new artist showcase becomes the nexus of the rivalry between Raq and Unique; Kanan cooks up a drug-selling scheme with Marvin.

programme.title: Lie With Me
programme.desc: A young man (Eric Balfour) and woman (Lauren Lee Smith) enjoy sexual compatibility but have trouble communicating and helping each other with problems. Starring Eric Balfour, Lauren Lee Smith, Don Francks.

programme.title: Diamond Tongues
programme.desc: Edith dreams of being a successful actress, but cannot land any roles. When she can't figure out what she is doing wrong, she starts to mess everything up. Starring Leah Fay Goldstein, Nick Flanagan, Adam Gurfinkel.

programme.title: Long Life, Happiness and Prosperity
programme.desc: A child (Valerie Tian) unwittingly wreaks havoc around her when she tries magic spells to find a new husband for her divorced, overworked mother (Sandra Oh). Starring Sandra Oh, Valerie Tian, Tsai Chin.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The team goes on a routine mission to retrieve an Abnormal and take it to safety; the mission becomes anything but routine when they are forced to stage a bank heist in order to protect the public from harm.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla resurfaces, sending Helen an SOS from deep within the Colombian Highlands; Will doesn't believe he can be trusted, and he may be right.

programme.title: Spies in Disguise
programme.desc: Lance is a super cool and charming spy, and Walter invents the super cool gadgets that Lance uses. But when events take an unexpected turn, Walter and Lance suddenly have to rely on each other in a whole new way. Starring Will Smith, Tom Holland, Rashida Jones.

programme.title: Cats & Dogs
programme.desc: An eager beagle joins undercover canines on a mission to foil a feline plot to make all people allergic to dogs. Starring Jeff Goldblum, Elizabeth Perkins, Miriam Margolyes.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs 2: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: Felines and canines form an unprecedented alliance to protect themselves and their humans from a rogue cat who wants to turn the world into her personal scratching post. Starring James Marsden, Nick Nolte, Christina Applegate.

programme.title: Meditation Park
programme.desc: A dutiful wife and mother re-examines her veneration of her husband after she finds another woman's underwear in his laundry. Starring Sandra Oh, Liane Balaban, Tzi Ma.

programme.title: Grown Ups
programme.desc: Friends and former teammates (Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock) learn that age does not, necessarily, equal maturity when they reunite to honor the memory of their basketball coach. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: Lenny Feder moves his family back to his hometown to be with his old friends and finds out that he didn't leave the crazy life behind in Los Angeles. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Clueless
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen (Alicia Silverstone) plays matchmaker for teachers, transforms a bad dresser (Brittany Murphy) and examines her own existence. Starring Alicia Silverstone, Stacey Dash, Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Hairspray
programme.desc: In the 1960s Baltimore a plump teen becomes an overnight celebrity after she wins a spot on a local dance program called "The Corny Collins Show." Starring John Travolta, Nikki Blonsky, Amanda Bynes.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A multimedia poet (Mike Myers) falls for a San Francisco butcher (Nancy Travis) who may be a husband killer, and he may be next. Starring Mike Myers, Nancy Travis, Anthony LaPaglia.

programme.title: Raintree County
programme.desc: A New Orleans belle (Elizabeth Taylor) lures a man (Montgomery Clift) away from his sweetheart (Eva Marie Saint) and into marriage during the Civil War. Starring Montgomery Clift, Elizabeth Taylor, Eva Marie Saint.

programme.title: All of Me
programme.desc: A mystic's accident forces a lawyer (Steve Martin) to share his body with the essence of an acerbic rich woman (Lily Tomlin). Starring Steve Martin, Lily Tomlin, Victoria Tennant.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents. Starring Steve Martin, Mary Steenburgen, Dianne Wiest.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: A harried patriarch (Steve Martin) faces separation anxiety, exorbitant costs and more as he prepares for his daughter's (Kimberly Williams) wedding. Starring Steve Martin, Diane Keaton, Kimberly Williams-Paisley.

programme.title: The Bride Wore Black
programme.desc: François Truffaut's Hitchcockian account of a widow's efforts to take revenge against the men who killed her husband. Starring Jeanne Moreau, Claude Rich, Jean-Claude Brialy.

programme.title: The Bride Wore Red
programme.desc: A cabaret singer's (Joan Crawford) noble boyfriend presents her at a Tirolean resort, where she charms two men (Franchot Tone, Robert Young). Starring Joan Crawford, Franchot Tone, Robert Young.

programme.title: The Breaking Point
programme.desc: A charter-boat captain winds up in the middle of a syndicate shootout after transporting illegal immigrants. Starring John Garfield, Patricia Neal, Phyllis Thaxter.

programme.title: Border Incident
programme.desc: A U.S. immigration agent and his Mexican counterpart go undercover to stop traffic in slave labor. Starring Ricardo Montalban, George Murphy, Howard Da Silva.

programme.title: Mystery in Mexico
programme.desc: An insurance investigator (William Lundigan) looks for stolen jewels with a missing colleague's sister (Jacqueline White). Starring William Lundigan, Jacqueline White, Ricardo Cortez.

programme.title: The Big Steal
programme.desc: Two guys (Robert Mitchum, William Bendix) and a woman (Jane Greer) chase an Army payroll thief through Mexico. Starring Robert Mitchum, Jane Greer, William Bendix.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two men on a fishing trip give a lift to a trigger-happy killer. Starring Edmond O'Brien, Frank Lovejoy, William Talman.

programme.title: Jeopardy
programme.desc: A woman (Barbara Stanwyck) lures a fugitive (Ralph Meeker) to help her husband (Barry Sullivan), trapped under a piling at low tide. Starring Barbara Stanwyck, Barry Sullivan, Ralph Meeker.

programme.title: Second Chance
programme.desc: A hit man (Jack Palance) catches a gangster's ex-girlfriend (Linda Darnell) and her boxer lover (Robert Mitchum) on a mountain cable car. Starring Robert Mitchum, Linda Darnell, Jack Palance.

programme.title: His Kind of Woman
programme.desc: Lured to Mexico, a gambler (Robert Mitchum) meets a café singer (Jane Russell) and learns a gangster wants his face. Starring Robert Mitchum, Jane Russell, Vincent Price.

programme.title: Out of the Past
programme.desc: A private eye (Robert Mitchum) cannot seem to get away from a gambler (Kirk Douglas) and his no-good girlfriend (Jane Greer). Starring Robert Mitchum, Jane Greer, Kirk Douglas.

programme.title: Late Spring
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Chishû Ryû) fakes an impending marriage to spur his adult daughter (Setsuko Hara) to get on with her life. Starring Setsuko Hara, Chishu Ryu, Haruko Sugimura.

programme.title: Early Summer
programme.desc: A 28-year-old Japanese woman resists parental and societal pressures to marry. Starring Setsuko Hara, Chishu Ryu, Kuniko Miyake.

programme.title: Tokyo Story
programme.desc: An elderly Japanese couple (Chishu Ryu, Chieko Higashiyama) visit their busy children but are not treated with respect. Starring Chishu Ryu, Chieko Higashiyama, Setsuko Hara.

programme.title: What Did the Lady Forget?
programme.desc: Caring for a rebellious niece causes trouble for a couple. Starring Sumiko Kurishima, Tatsuo Saitô, Kayoko Kuwano.

programme.title: The Brothers and Sisters of the Toda Family
programme.desc: After their father's untimely death, elder Japanese siblings fail in their duty to take care of their widowed mother and youngest, unmarried sister. Starring Mieko Takamine, Shin Saburi, Hideo Fujino.

programme.title: There Was a Father
programme.desc: In the wake of a terrible tragedy, a poor schoolteacher hopes that his son will succeed where he has failed. Starring Shin Saburi, Takeshi Sakamoto, Shûji Sano.

programme.title: White Comanche
programme.desc: A peace officer settles a quarrel between twins, the offspring of an American Indian mother and a white father. Starring Joseph Cotten, William Shatner, Perla Cristal.

programme.title: Hate for Hate
programme.desc: A bank robber (John Ireland) teams up with a drifter (Antonio Sabato) to hunt down a killer they each know well. Starring Antonio Sabato, John Ireland, Fernando Sancho.

programme.title: Guns for San Sebastian
programme.desc: Bullied mountain villagers learn how to fight back from an outlaw (Anthony Quinn) posing as a monk in 18th-century Mexico. Starring Anthony Quinn, Anjanette Comer, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Mail Order Bride
programme.desc: An old lawman (Buddy Ebsen) finds a Kansas City bride (Lois Nettleton) for a young and restless Montana rancher (Keir Dullea). Starring Buddy Ebsen, Keir Dullea, Lois Nettleton.

programme.title: Return of the Gunfighter
programme.desc: A gunfighter (Robert Taylor) and a cowboy (Chad Everett) help a Mexican girl (Ana Martín) avenge the land-related murder of her parents. Starring Robert Taylor, Chad Everett, Ana Martín.

programme.title: Ride the High Country
programme.desc: Two aging ex-lawmen are hired to transport a shipment of gold from a mining camp into town after six miners were murdered attempting to transport the gold themselves. Starring Randolph Scott, Joel McCrea, Mariette Hartley.

programme.title: Welcome to Hard Times
programme.desc: A mayor's cowardice allows an outlaw to ride roughshod over the citizens of a desolate frontier town. Starring Henry Fonda, Janice Rule, Aldo Ray.

programme.title: Ed Wood
programme.desc: Edward D. Wood Jr. (Johnny Depp) directs awful '50s cult films like Glen or Glenda and Plan 9 From Outer Space. Starring Johnny Depp, Martin Landau, Sarah Jessica Parker.

programme.title: The Great Ziegfeld
programme.desc: The life and times of Broadway showman Florenz Ziegfeld and his two wives. Starring William Powell, Luise Rainer, Myrna Loy.

programme.title: Too Much, Too Soon
programme.desc: Based on the autobiography of Diana Barrymore (Dorothy Malone), the troubled daughter of actor John Barrymore (Errol Flynn). Starring Dorothy Malone, Errol Flynn, Efrem Zimbalist.

programme.title: The George Raft Story
programme.desc: A Broadway dancer (Ray Danton) goes to Hollywood and begins his movie career as a gangster in "Scarface." Starring Ray Danton, Jayne Mansfield, Julie London.

programme.title: The Actress
programme.desc: Supported by her mother, a New Englander (Jean Simmons) finally tells her salty father (Spencer Tracy) she wants to be an actress. Starring Spencer Tracy, Jean Simmons, Anthony Perkins.

programme.title: The Phenix City Story
programme.desc: The son (Richard Kiley) of an ill-fated anti-crime crusader (John McIntire) tries to clean up his notorious Alabama hometown. Starring John McIntire, Richard Kiley, Kathryn Grant.

programme.title: While The City Sleeps
programme.desc: Three New York newsmen use women (Ida Lupino, Rhonda Fleming) and a reporter (Dana Andrews) to find a so-called Lipstick Killer. Starring Dana Andrews, Ida Lupino, Rhonda Fleming.

programme.title: We Who Are About to Die

programme.title: Badlands
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking teenage girl joins a garbage man on a South Dakota killing spree. Starring Martin Sheen, Sissy Spacek, Warren Oates.

programme.desc: A Victorian governess (Valerie Hobson) marries an English heir, then plots with a stableboy (Stewart Granger) to kill him. Starring Stewart Granger, Valerie Hobson, Walter Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Agatha

programme.desc: An interview sheds new light on a troubling comment made on a hunting trip years before.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: A young woman, her new boyfriend and her single mother embark on a sailing adventure to Bermuda. However, when criminals suddenly attack their boat, the pleasure trip turns into a desperate fight for survival and a quest for vengeance. Starring Odeya Rush, Eric Dane, Saffron Burrows.

programme.title: The Painter
programme.desc: An ex-CIA operative is tracked down by a young woman and they become entangled in an unauthorized black ops program. Starring Charlie Weber, Madison Bailey, Jon Voight.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

programme.title: Dangerous Waters

However, when criminals suddenly attack their boat, the pleasure trip turns into a desperate fight for survival and a quest for vengeance. Starring Odeya Rush, Eric Dane, Saffron Burrows.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening; a burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Professional soldier Skylar Nemetz claims he has a momentary lapse in gun safety that lead to his wife Danielle's tragic death; authorities aren't buying that someone with his level of training could accidentally forget to do some basic gun care.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: Police finds a new mother murdered soon after reported missing; they bring her partner and his best friend in to be interrogated about her final night; not every interrogation method works with every suspect, and not every theory proves true.

programme.title: A Podcast to Die For
programme.desc: When the host of a true-crime podcast stumbles upon an unsolved local murder, she quickly finds herself entangled in a deadly game of cat and mouse that exposes the horrible truth behind the killings. Starring Kate Miner, Matthew MacCaull, Claire Friesen.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Grief boils into vengeance; Rob crosses a line, and the innocence in him dies; what rises in its place will shape the future of England.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: Counting down his last days as chief of police in the tiny town of Lone Crow, John Hawkins must investigate one last case when a mangled body with uncanny wounds washes up on the shores of the Porcupine River. Starring Allan Hawco, Emily Alatalo, Natalie Brown.

programme.title: The Last Video Store
programme.desc: A cursed VHS tape unleashes classic cinematic villains into the real world. Starring Kevin Martin, Yaayaa Adams, Matthew Kennedy.

programme.title: Finally Caught

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A husband and wife take a cruise to celebrate their good luck in business, but their luck takes a turn at the apex of their journey, with many wondering what happened aboard the ship.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: Newlyweds board a cruise ship, but things take a turn for the worse when one disappears in the middle of the night; a blood stained canopy is all the only sign of a young man's fate; leaving many more questions than answers to what happened.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The murder of Cari Farver unfolds amidst a complex web of jealousy and obsession in her relationships with David Kroupa and Shanna Liz Golyar.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: The case of Gretchen Anthony, a woman known for her vibrant and positive personality, unfolds as a chilling tale of domestic violence and deceit; in March 2020, her estranged husband, David Anthony, murdered her in their Florida home.

programme.title: What We Inherit
programme.desc: After discovering his ancestors were both pioneers and enslavers, Kacim journeys through the complexities of his American and Algerian heritage, confronting histories of conquest, slavery, and the weight of an inherited legacy.

programme.desc: Yoga teacher Ann cannot escape her manic family and miserable dating life. Things start looking up, however, when her friends set her up with a divorced dad who has an adorable 7-year-old daughter. Starring Heather Graham, John Brotherton, Julia Stiles.

programme.desc: Police questions Stephen after he speaks to news outlets about the search for a woman missing from his building; when Stephen appears to shut down completely, the challenge moves from looking for a confession to trying to get him to speak at all.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie (2024)

programme.title: Face/Off (1997)
programme.desc: An FBI agent (John Travolta) and his nemesis (Nicolas Cage) trade physical identities.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking man's inability to say no to a beautiful woman gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)
programme.desc: During the era of Tammany Hall's sway, a young man (Leonardo DiCaprio) vows vengeance on the vicious gangster (Daniel Day-Lewis) who killed his father.

programme.title: Undisputed (2002)
programme.desc: An undefeated world-champion prizefighter, who is convicted of rape and sent to prison, must confront and fight the reigning prison boxing champion.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widow's (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Downhill Racer (1969)
programme.desc: A cocky American skis and après-skis Europe, training with his coach for the Olympics.

programme.title: Wolves (2016)
programme.desc: A talented high school basketball player's (Taylor John Smith) dreams of playing college ball are jeopardized by his hard-drinking father's (Michael Shannon) compulsive gambling.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis (2018)

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering what's left of humanity.

programme.title: Snag (2023)
programme.desc: After learning the woman he once loved is being held captive by ruthless gangsters, a lone wolf seeks out allies and storms into a world of violence to rescue her.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction (1987)
programme.desc: A New York lawyer (Michael Douglas) with a wife (Anne Archer) and daughter sleeps with a client (Glenn Close) whose lust turns to hate.

programme.title: Private Parts (1997)
programme.desc: Howard Stern (Howard Stern) recalls his personal life and the controversial style that made him a radio celebrity.

programme.title: The Ledge (2011)
programme.desc: After an atheistic neighbor (Charlie Hunnam) has an affair with his wife, a vengeful Fundamentalist forces the man to choose between killing himself or allowing someone else to die in his place.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: The Infernal Machine (2022)
programme.desc: Reclusive and controversial author Bruce Cogburn is drawn out of hiding when he begins to receive endless letters from an obsessive fan. What ensues is a dangerous labyrinth as Bruce searches for the person behind the cryptic messages.

programme.title: The Presidio (1988)
programme.desc: An Army provost marshal (Sean Connery) clashes with a detective (Mark Harmon) over a murder at the San Francisco military base.

programme.title: Hamburger Hill (1987)
programme.desc: An account of the 101st Airborne Division's 10-day struggle to secure a strategic mountainside in South Vietnam.

programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Scream (1996)

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall (2024)
programme.desc: Young Remi has her future figured out, until she meets Barnes, who lives for the moment and makes her question everything. As their love story unfolds, she faces a choice -- stick to her plan or risk it all for a life she never saw coming.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)
programme.desc: A beautiful globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) battles otherworldly creatures for possession of a powerful artifact.

programme.title: Molly's Game (2017)

programme.title: Would You Rather (2012)
